case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. VS. SERGIO LOBITO ET AL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOBITO, SERGIO AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-23-2018
DECLARATION RE NON SERVICE - NON ESTES (TRANSACTION ID # 100032296) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC.

DECLARATION REGARDING STATEMENT OF VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 100031735) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC.
